'''鈭歳-g-g-v''' ('''karagevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:espouse|espouse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-g-g-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:espouse|espouse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-g-g-v
|-
! Lemma
| karagevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiragevoko|thiragevoko]] || [[word:jiragevoko|jiragevoko]] || [[word:shiragevoko|shiragevoko]] || [[word:kiragevoko|kiragevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ragevoko|th忙ragevoko]] || [[word:j忙ragevoko|j忙ragevoko]] || [[word:sh忙ragevoko|sh忙ragevoko]] || [[word:k忙ragevoko|k忙ragevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
